name: 撒糖型（互相裝窮的甜蜜互動）
description: 雙方都知道對方在裝窮卻不拆穿，用「普通食物」「普通裝修」這樣的謊言互相配合。觀眾因為知道真相而感到甜蜜和好笑。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: You sure this is just common creamy tuna and mushroom pasta? It looks suspicious. / Yeah, it's so normal. As home style as it gets. / You know, like the worst case scenario is just we both get diarrhea.
